description: Go program where language.Parse() only exists in a file guarded by a build tag (//go:build integration). The production main.go never calls Parse(). CVE-2022-32149 should be not_affected since the vulnerable code path is excluded from normal builds.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: language.Parse() only appears in parse_integration_test.go behind //go:build integration. Production main.go does not call any vulnerable function.

findings.human_justification: language.Parse() is only present in a test file with //go:build integration constraint. The production binary never includes this code path.
